{{Quote|Governor Griff Takel was appointed to the world of Esseles, in the Darpa sector, after the local uprising overthrew that planet's Confederacy presence.|CIS Shadowfeed|<ref name="CSD" />}}
The '''Battle of Esseles''' took place five [[Standard month/Legends|months]] after the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|First Battle of Geonosis]].<ref name="TNEC" /> When a [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist]]-funded government faction declared that the planet had joined the Confederacy of Independent Systems,<ref name="TNEC" /> a [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] loyalist resistance movement was formed.<ref name="CSD" /><ref name="TNEC" /> The two sides clashed for five days in a battle described as "bloody." The loyalists eventually won, however, and they forced the Separatist faction out.<ref name="TNEC" /> After the battle, [[Griff Takel]] was appointed as [[Governor/Legends|Governor]] of [[Esseles/Legends|Esseles]] by the Republic.<ref name="CSD" />
